# hetzner-robot_rdns (Data Source)

Looks up the reverse DNS (PTR) record for an IP address (`GET /rdns/{ip}`).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hetzner-robot_rdns" "node" {
  ip = "1.2.3.4"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip` (String) IP address

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `ptr` (String) PTR record (hostname)
